result.title: Anthropic Users Are PISSED
result.description:
Anthropic just got caught red handed 😳

User have been reporting a huge bug in the system that's been charging them hundred of dollars extra on top of their Max subscriptions.

Support initially refused to refund users and it feels like Anthropic only backtracked after the story got millions of views.

Not a great look...

#ai #ainews #anthropic #claudecode #vibecoding

result.title: Did Google Just Sell Out?!
result.description:
Is Google selling out?

Google just signed a massive deal with the Pentagon to use its AI for classified information. This directly contradicts the ethical boundaries they set when they bought DeepMind back in 2014, and over 600 of their own employees are actively begging them not to do it.

But with the government holding the keys to the future of AI legislation and contracts, my take is that Google was kind of in a no-win situation. 

What do you think? Should they have held the line like Anthropic, or is this the right business move?

#AI #Ainews #Google #deepmind

result.title: Deepseek V4 May Disrupt The Entire AI Economy
result.description:
Big Tech is sweating right now… 

DeepSeek V4 is nearly state-of-the-art, open-sourced, and costs a fraction of what competitors are charging. We’re talking $1.74 per million input tokens compared to $5 for GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.7.

Almost the exact same capabilities, massive cost savings, AND the ability to run it locally for total privacy? This AI may disrupt the entire AI economy.

#AI #Ainews #deepseek #opensource

result.title: Elon vs. OpenAI Lawsuit Explained
result.description:
The biggest soap opera in Silicon Valley is happening right now 🍿

Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman, claiming they abandoned their founding mission to "benefit humanity" in favor of chasing profits. OpenAI is saying that Elon is just mad and trying to boost his own AI competitor, Grok. 

But the real tea is Elon's behavior during this trial because apparently his time on the stand did not go smoothly...

Whose side are you on in this tech battle? Team Elon or Team OpenAI?

And for all the latest AI news, models, and upgrades each week, check out my full video linked here.

#ainews #ai #elonmusk #samaltman #openai
